---
title: "PipelineResult"
generated: true
description: "Output of [`syn_pipeline`](../nitrix-register-recipes/syn_pipeline.qmd) -- the composed staged transform."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register.recipes`](../nitrix-register-recipes.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:PipelineResult -->
```python
class PipelineResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:PipelineResult -->
Output of [`syn_pipeline`](../nitrix-register-recipes/syn_pipeline.qmd) -- the composed staged transform.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
